transcript: this luxury Land Rover SUV was once $66,000 but today it's $4,000 but the real shocker is all these receipts dating back to 2004 let's add them up so I just got done calculating all these receipts you're not going to believe this the grand total for all the repairs and maintenance for my 2004 Land Rover Discovery is $4,036 man I need to Magic mine after this side note if you invested that $40,000 into the S&P 500 in 2004 and never look back today that $40,000 would be worth just under $300,000
